steps.title: Use the contrast with NEPS
steps.content: NEPS needs extensive funding because it tracks educational trends over long timescales and at repeated intervals. The transportation example is more constrained: it seeks only an average number of daily public-transportation users.

steps.title: Reject funding distractions
steps.content: B discusses priority for funding rather than dependence on funding. C focuses on participant count without connecting it to the study's goal. D speculates about expanding the study's scope, which the passage does not require.

steps.title: Explain the lower dependence
steps.content: A study seeking a daily average is less funding dependent because it is not trying to identify trends over time. The answer is A.
